name: Fastenal
analysis: FAST has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at $45.8697. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Trade setup: entry $45.8697, stop $42.8274, target $46.5519. Risk/reward is 0.22:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
